response.global_analysis:
1. Song & Speaking Segments: The video contains a performance of 'Deep Dive' from 00:00 to 01:15, followed by an instrumental performance of 'Guns of Saxophone' with no vocals from 01:15 to 02:36. Spoken dialogue begins at 02:37 where VTuber Todoroki Hajime introduces her birthday merchandise.
2. Accuracy: No reference lyrics were provided in the JSON, so all song lyrics and spoken words were transcribed manually. Timestamps have been closely aligned to the exact vocal triggers.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed strictly to vocal bursts to avoid cascading delays, leaving the instrumental section (01:15 - 02:36) without subtitles to respect the audio boundaries.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、生誕グッズが出ました！
subtitles.english: Alright! So, my birthday merchandise is out!

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ誕生日記念2026、フルセットはこんな感じです！
subtitles.english: Todoroki Hajime Birthday Celebration 2026, the full set looks like this!

subtitles.original: 一つずつ紹介していきやす！
subtitles.english: Let me introduce them one by one!

subtitles.original: 一つ目！「ぷんぷんばんちょーアクリルスタンド」！
subtitles.english: First! "Angry Bancho Acrylic Stand"!

subtitles.original: イラストは、A5きちゃんに書いていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by A5ki-chan!

subtitles.original: 台座が二つあるので、座ってる風にも、いろんなシチュエーションでも使えます！
subtitles.english: Since there are two bases, you can use it sitting down or in various other situations!

subtitles.original: 怒っているのがポイントです！
subtitles.english: The key point is that she's angry!

subtitles.original: 二つ目！「はじめとおそろいチョーカー」！
subtitles.english: Second! "Matching Choker with Hajime"!

subtitles.original: はじめの新衣装とおそろいのチョーカーです！
subtitles.english: This is a choker matching Hajime's new outfit!

subtitles.original: 星のチャームがかわいい！
subtitles.english: The star charm is so cute!

subtitles.original: 「首のサイズが合わないよ」っていう方は、おカバンなどに付けてください！
subtitles.english: If you're like, "My neck size doesn't match," please attach it to your bag!

subtitles.original: 三つ目！「BANCHOジャージ」！
subtitles.english: Third! "BANCHO Jersey"!

subtitles.original: 裏面のイラストは、おもちチャウダーちゃんに書いていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustration on the back was drawn by Omochi Chowder-chan!

subtitles.original: 表面は刺繍になってます！
subtitles.english: The front features embroidery!

subtitles.original: スバル先輩の生地がとても良かったので、おなじのにしていただきました！
subtitles.english: Subaru-senpai's jersey material was so good, I got them to use the same one!

subtitles.original: 最後！「ぬいぐるみキーホルダー ブラックオーロラ衣装ver.」！
subtitles.english: Last! "Plushie Keyholder Black Aurora Outfit ver."!

subtitles.original: はじめて出したミニぬいぐるみの新衣装バージョンです！
subtitles.english: It's the new outfit version of the first mini plushie we released!

subtitles.original: 「あの時買えなかったよ」っていう方、ぜひお迎えしてください！
subtitles.english: If you're like, "I couldn't buy it back then," please bring one home!

subtitles.original: そして、フルセット特典はこちら！
subtitles.english: And here is the full set bonus!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのチケット風カード！
subtitles.english: A ticket-style card from this concert!

subtitles.original: 全員に直筆サインを書かせていただきやす！
subtitles.english: I will be hand-signing it for everyone!

subtitles.original: 去年のね、ライブでたくさんグッズを買っていただいたおかげで、
subtitles.english: Thanks to everyone buying so much merch at last year's concert,

subtitles.original: 今年もこんなに力を入れることができました！
subtitles.english: we were able to put so much effort into it again this year!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございやす！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブも楽しんでいただけただろうか？
subtitles.english: I hope you've been enjoying today's concert as well!

subtitles.original: 生誕グッズもお迎えしていただけると、今後の励みになりやす！
subtitles.english: Bringing these birthday goods home with you will encourage me greatly in the future!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いいたしやす！
subtitles.english: Thank you for your support!

subtitles.original: 以上、グッズ紹介でした！
subtitles.english: That's all for the merchandise introduction!

subtitles.original: よーし、みなさん！
subtitles.english: Alright, everyone!

subtitles.original: このあとラストスパート！
subtitles.english: Up next is the final spurt!

subtitles.original: いっしょに盛り上がっていってください！いきやすよ！
subtitles.english: Let's pump it up together! Here we go!
